New: Point and click plotting: you can now plot points by pointing and clicking in the viewport
Plotted points information: track how many points, estimated triangles, and coverage area (in acres or hectares) will be generated
Per sub-triangle material and color selection: specify a different material and color for individual triangles
Edit later: return to an older terrain generation to add, remove, or adjust points (color and material editing coming later)
Attach to existing terrain: while plotting a new terrain, attach boundary points to an existing terrain generation
Settings tab: customizable plugin theme colors and unit options (Imperial / Metric) with individual controls
Improved: Unified UI/UX design with CivilArc Road Toolkit

New: Custom color saving: paint colors can now be saved and retained between sessions
Up to 5 custom colors can be stored at a time
Fixed: Rogue triangle generation reduced — stray triangles are less prominent than before
Improved: Triangle generation is now more optimized

New: Initial release — TIN terrain generation via Delaunay triangulation
Terrain style dock with material and color pickers
